person_name: Domitius Afer, Roman prosecutor and orator (fl. early 1st century CE)
person_name_full: Domitius Afer, Roman prosecutor and orator (fl. early 1st century CE)
notes: Roman prosecutor and orator active in early 1st century CE, known for prosecuting Claudia Pulchra and noted by Pliny the Younger and Tacitus.

docs.title: Letter 8018
docs.author: Pliny the Younger
docs.excerpt: … equally strange that he should be so harsh as to procure the banishment of a man whose children he had adopted, and that they should be so lucky as to find a father in the very person who had driven their father into banishment.
